para_trans: The Civil Local Bodies in the state are required to give administrative approval to the maintenance repair cost for three years from the expiry of the warranty period of disaster response material / equipment for the fire brigade as a first-response mechanism.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department,
(Disaster Management, Relief and Rehabilitation)
Government Decision No: APR-2025 / Q147 / Disaster-1 / ₹-1344676
1 floor, Main Building, Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Marg,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032
Date: April 10, 2026
Read: - 1) State Executive Committee. The minutes of the meeting on August 22, 2025.
2) Government Decision, Revenue and Forest Department No.2025 / No.147 / Disaster-1, D. 06.02.2026 3) Government Decision, Revenue & Forest Department No. 10.02.2026
The Proposal: -

Maharashtra is a multi-ethnic state and is known to be the most urbanized state in the country. The changing environment is leading to large-scale economic and human loss due to frequent occurrence of natural and man-made disasters. The increasing industrialization of the state along with natural, man-made disasters, and the rapid development of communication facilities such as the newly created highways, TRA, Prosperity Highways along with the development of the state, have led to frequent disaster-prone incidents due to heavy traffic at different tourist places, temple sites in the state. As a result, the number of accidents on the highway has increased.

The fire brigade acts as a first response mechanism in case of natural and man-made disasters occurring in civil and nearby areas. To equip the system with necessary materials and machinery and to enable it to respond effectively to emergencies, the Department of Urban Development has sanctioned Rs. 178.1131 crores was given administrative approval under No. 2 & 3. The State Executive Committee had directed to entrust the responsibility of maintenance repair to the respective suppliers for the next three years from the expiry of the warranty period after the supply of the material material for which the administrative approval was given. As per the directions of the committee, Rs. The issue of administrative approval of the 42.49 crore expenditure was under consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:

Annual maintenance repair of the following materials / machinery for enabling fire fighting systems will be undertaken at a cost of Rs. Administrative sanction is being given for an expenditure of 42.49 crores. : -
table_trans: The name of the equipment and materials
Mini Rescue Tender with Water Mist Technology
SOLtrs. Trolley Mounted High Pressure Water Mist & CAF Fire Extinguisher

para_trans: 2. To strengthen the State Disaster Response Systems, the Central Government has implemented the National Disaster Preparedness and Capacity Building component under the 15th Finance Commission's Five Year Programme from 2021-2022 to 2025-26.
The above proposal is accorded administrative approval by taking the prescribed action as per the standards of the Managing Authority.
It is.
This maintenance repair period is from the end of the material supply and its warranty period.
It will be applicable for the next three years.
